insight: Foundation's SimpleCommandCore.delegateExecute used to discard the runtime-invoked label, so the {label} placeholder and auto-generated "Usage: /…" line always showed the registered main label (e.g. /tell) instead of the alias typed (/msg, /w). PR #3732 adds a `protected String currentLabel` field set in delegateExecute and read by preparePlaceholders() and getEffectiveCommand(); SimpleCommandGroup forwards it to subcommands.
